g.text: No memory wins universally because different observables

text.style: font-size: 7.15px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans'; fill: #7c2d12

g.text: and flow regimes protect different parts of the past.

text.style: font-weight: 700; font-size: 14.1px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans'; text-anchor: start; fill: #102a43

g.text: A memory-adequacy atlas for non-Fickian transport

text.style: font-size: 9.15px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans'; text-anchor: start; fill: #64748b

g.text: The product is not a winning sampler; it is a map of which forgetting is safe under each condition.
